case_title: PACIFIC AUTOMOTIVE CO. VS. PV AUTO SERVICE & TIRES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-23-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF OF MINIMUM $300.00. PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT WHEN FULL AMOUNT OF $1876.43 PLUS COSTS IS MADE.
